Population-by-Sex.description: Population broken down by male and female.

Number-of-households-by-main-source-of-d.description: Households classified by their main source of drinking water.

Number-of-households-by-source-of-lighti.description: Households classified by their primary source of lighting.

Number-of-housing-units-by-main-material.label: Walls
Number-of-housing-units-by-main-material.description: Housing units classified by the main material used for wall construction (e.g. brick, cabook, cadjan).

Population-by-ethnicity.description: Population distributed by ethnic group (e.g. Sinhalese, Sri Lanka Tamil, Moor).

Population-by-religion.description: Population distributed by religious affiliation (e.g. Buddhist, Hindu, Islam).
